sourceTitle: Relevant Policies for the Use of AI Tools
queryUsed: N/A - discovered via genai.uchicago.edu About navigation menu
verificationNotes: REPAIR re-verification via OpenCLI browser extract: 6514 chars. Contains Policy Crosswalk mapping 9 existing university policies to AI use: Acceptable Use, Confidential Information, Business Conduct, File Sharing, External Service Providers, SSN Usage, Research Data Protection, SRDS, Harassment/Discrimination. Plus General Guidelines on confidential/sensitive/restricted data with AI tools.
